name: Adler Modemrkte AG Inhaber-Akti
summary: Adler Modemärkte AG was a German fashion retailer headquartered in Haibach near Aschaffenburg. The company operated a chain of fashion stores, primarily in Germany, and also had a presence in Austria, Luxembourg, and Switzerland, offering a range of clothing, shoes, and accessories for women, men, and children. The company filed for insolvency in 2021 and subsequently liquidated.
